package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for response_dto_uses_omitempty_on_required_contract_fields: Response shapes that silently drop fields that should be stable parts of the API contract.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule146NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule146NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule146NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario146Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule146NegativeService, input Rule146NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
